// Conductor — MCP server config example: Rename to mcp.json and fill in connections you want Copilot Chat to access. MCP is optional — Conductor works without any MCP servers.

filesystem.// note: Lets Copilot Chat read project files via MCP. Useful but not required — Copilot already has file access in VS Code.

github.// note: Optional. Gives Conductor read access to your GitHub issues, PRs, and metadata.
